scope: read-only inspection of a private personal Hermes installation

probes.definition: Expected role profiles each have their own configuration, behavior contract, and state database.
The gateway state record reports a running lifecycle state.
The recorded gateway process identifier resolves to a live process.
The configured remote messaging adapter reports a connected state without exposing its identity or credential.
The team orchestration layer has durable board state rather than prompt-only handoffs.
The canonical knowledge vault is reachable, contains Markdown records, and includes reviewable metadata on a substantial subset.

limitations: The probe is a point-in-time first-party inspection, not continuous monitoring or independent certification.
Counts describe the observed topology; they do not establish that more profiles or notes produce better outcomes.
No successful full disaster-recovery restore is claimed by this artifact.
Separate maintenance warnings existed outside this six-probe scope.
